sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23500" key="da/sofrus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δάσοφρυς</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, <sense id="n23500.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with shaggy brows,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
